title: World War I: Trenches
description: A World War I-style trench warfare modpack; includes a trench map.
body:
# World War I: Trenches
- This is a modpack created for a World War I event that was played around a year ago. (See \_ToL_'s video below)
- [stirelic](https://modrinth.com/user/stirelic) compiled the core gameplay mods and [\_ToL_](https://modrinth.com/user/_ToL_) optimized the modpack to bring it to completion.
- We wanted to create a simple modpack to simulate trench warfare with guns.

## Mods
We included [TaCZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero) and [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) for the main content of the modpack, with some extra mods to enhance the experience, like [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered). For optimization, a (now outdated) version of \_ToL_'s Optimization was included. (see Configuration)

## Map
A fresh copy of the map is included with the modpack, but you can also download it [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/world-war-1-no-man-s-land-trenches).

## Configuration
Please configure the included mods to your playstyle and preferences: video settings, keybinds, etc. You especially need to configure [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium), or you will face some unexpected results with your GUI! If you don't want to configure Exordium (or any other mod), feel free to disable/remove it.

## Shaders
[Nostalgia](https://modrinth.com/shader/nostalgia-shader) v5.1 is included with the modpack. It was used in the video, and it's one of our favorite shaders. Feel free to experiment and/or add your own.
